contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Autopilot post-mortem fixes (4 bundles, integration tests, pending cleanup) + chat UI feedback (6 PRs across truesight_autopilot + dapp)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/29
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/31
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/32
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/33
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/34
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/224
  
  Details:
  Tackled all 7 issues from the post-mortem of yesterday's autopilot session, plus two follow-on fixes that surfaced during/after that work.
  
  Shipped (truesight_autopilot):
  - #29 chat: DSML sanitization + abort endpoint (DELETE /chat/active) + cancel-aware loops. Strips raw <｜｜DSML｜｜...> blobs DeepSeek/GLM occasionally leaks; emits explicit wanted_more_rounds event; cancel propagates through both LLM and tool calls within ~15s.
  - #30 reliability: signal-loggers in lifespan() + tool smoke tests at scripts/smoke_tools.py + GitHub Actions smoke CI. Diagnoses the next "local autopilot died" mystery; catches the next paramiko-shaped latent bug at PR time. 10/10 smoke tests pass.
  - #31 safety: transcript publish opt-out (do_not_publish payload flag) + regex redaction (AKIA/sk-/ghp_/JWT/RSA private-key/env-secret) + autopilot/fix-* branch janitor (PR-close webhook + 30d-old periodic prune across allowed_repos).
  - #32 refactor: consolidated the two _stream_chat tool-call loops into one helper. -22 LoC, eliminates drift between main turn and queue-processing turn. Also fixed two stale log strings still claiming DEEPSEEK RESP after the BigModel migration.
  - #33 test: promoted three chat integration tests (smoke, interjection, cancel) to tests/integration/ with a shared GovernorKey/stream/queue/cancel client + run_all.sh runner + scripts/launch_local_autopilot.py daemon launcher. All three pass against fresh local autopilot.
  - #34 fix(pending): auto-clean merge_pr entries whose PR is no longer open. Lazy on /pending GET + 12h janitor. Fixes the 'Merge PR #217' stale-pending complaint surfaced live by the operator. Manual sweep emptied both pending files on prod.
  
  Shipped (dapp):
  - #224 chat.html: visual feedback for the new SSE events (heartbeat → 'still thinking… (Xs on round N)', tool calling/done in status bar, cancelled, wanted_more_rounds inline yellow badge, queue interjected toast) + new ⏹ Stop button next to Send. Answers the operator's 'no way of knowing if it's working or done' complaint. Auto-deploys via GitHub Pages.
  
  Verification:
  - BigModel/glm-4.5 confirmed live on prod (LLM_PROVIDER=bigmodel; logs show https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/chat/completions HTTP 200 OK).
  - Production redeployed multiple times throughout (manual SSH + autopilot's own deploy_autopilot tool, the latter now actually working post #22).
  - Final prod HEAD: bd9ae6b. Systemd active across all redeploys.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

My Digital Signature: 

Request Transaction ID:

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
